zh.lifeSummary: 當Berauld II d'Auvergne於大約1333年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆瓦倫斯時，他的父親Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont19歲，母親Elisabeth de Montpreis21歲。他於1357年6月22日與Jeanne de Forez在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年1月17日享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berauld II d'Auvergne于大约1333年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆瓦倫斯时，他的父亲Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont19岁，母亲Elisabeth de Montpreis21岁。他于1357年6月22日与Jeanne de Forez在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年1月17日享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berauld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of French Gérauld (or perhaps of some other similar French surname), a variant of Gérald (see Gerald ). The surname Gérauld is very rare in France. Compare Gerould .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with the variant Gerould) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Gerald
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Gerould
meanings: Altered form of   Jerauld  , a surname of French origin.
History: This surname is listed along with the variant Jerauld in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Berauld II d'Auvergne was born about 1333, in Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont, was 19 and his mother, Elisabeth de Montpreis, was 21. He married Jeanne de Forez on 22 June 1357, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 17 January 1400, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berauld II d'Auvergne est né environ 1333, à Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Montpreis, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Forez le 22 juin 1357, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1400, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berauld II d'Auvergne um 1333 in Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont 19 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Montpreis 21. Er hat am 22. Juni 1357 in Frankreich Jeanne de Forez geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Januar 1400 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berauld II d'Auvergne è nato il circa 1333 nel Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Montpreis, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Forez il 22 giugno 1357, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 17 gennaio 1400, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Berauld II d'Auvergneが約1333年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメベレンスで生まれた時，父Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermontは19歳，母Elisabeth de Montpreisは21歳であった。1357年6月22日にフランスでJeanne de Forezと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年1月17日に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Berauld II d'Auvergne(이)가 대략 1333년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 발스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Montpreis(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1357년 6월 22일 프랑스에서 Jeanne de Forez(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 1월 17일 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berauld II d'Auvergne nasceu aproximadamente 1333, em Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Montpreis, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Forez em 22 de junho de 1357, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1400, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berauld II d'Auvergne родился около 1333 г. в местности веиленс, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Montpreis, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Forez 22 июня 1357 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 17 января 1400 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berauld II d'Auvergne nació aproximadamente 1333, en Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Béraud d'Auvergne I de Clermont, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Montpreis, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Forez el 22 de junio de 1357, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 17 de enero de 1400, a la edad de 68 años.
